dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the uprising has begun, but {quest_threat_animate_the} hit back hard. Your efforts to {quest_action} drew their attention.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} reports that {enemy_type} are sweeping the area near {quest_focus_the}. They are hunting for {quest_stakes_the}. We need you to intercept them {location_hint} before they find our people.
dialogueChunks.outro: The revolution lives or dies on what happens next. We need you out there.

dialogueChunks.intro: The crackdown came, {player_name}. After you helped us {quest_action}, {quest_threat_animate_the} retaliated against {quest_stakes_the} directly.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} is rallying supporters, but the {enemy_type} seized a cache near {quest_focus_the}: it is {location_hint}. Fight through them and break their hold on the area.
dialogueChunks.outro: Every blow against them strengthens our resolve. We cannot stop now.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, a spy within our ranks nearly undid everything. Since you helped {quest_action}, {quest_threat_the} learned the location of {quest_focus_the}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We had to move fast. {quest_ally} relocated {quest_stakes_the}, but {enemy_type} are converging on the area {location_hint}. We need someone to lead them away and deal with the patrols.
dialogueChunks.outro: Betrayal stings, but the cause is bigger than one traitor. Help us survive this.
